title: UMANG - Unified Mobile Application for New-age Governance

sections.content: Single mobile app for 1,700+ government services from 300+ departments. Available in 13 languages. Services: EPFO (PF balance/claim), DigiLocker, PMKISAN status, Aadhaar, passport, GSTN, land records, scholarship status, train/bus booking, utility bills, Ayushman eligibility check.

Popular services: (1) EPFO - PF passbook, claim status, UAN activation. (2) Income Tax - refund status, PAN verification. (3) PM-KISAN - beneficiary status. (4) Aadhaar - update request, download. (5) Passport - application status. (6) DigiLocker - access documents. (7) CBSE results. (8) Land records (some states). (9) Blood bank search. (10) Crop insurance status.
Download UMANG app (Android/iOS) or visit web.umang.gov.in. Register with mobile + Aadhaar OTP. PIN-based login after registration. No documents needed. All services accessible from one account.
